zh.lifeSummary: 當John Drakes於大約1247年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Captain Robert Drakes31歲，母親Mrs28歲。他於大約1276年與Mary Pannell在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Drakes于大约1247年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Captain Robert Drakes31岁，母亲Mrs28岁。他于大约1276年与Mary Pannell在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Drakes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

variants.name: Drake
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Drakes was born about 1247, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Captain Robert Drakes, was 31 and his mother, Mrs, was 28. He married Mary Pannell about 1276, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Drakes est né environ 1247, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Captain Robert Drakes, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Mrs, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Mary Pannell environ 1276, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Drakes um 1247 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Captain Robert Drakes 31 und seine Mutter Mrs 28. Er hat um 1276 in Yorkshire, England Mary Pannell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Drakes è nato il circa 1247 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Captain Robert Drakes, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Mrs, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Mary Pannell circa 1276, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: John Drakesが約1247年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Captain Robert Drakesは31歳，母Mrsは28歳であった。約1276年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでMary Pannellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John Drakes(이)가 대략 1247년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Captain Robert Drakes(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1276년 영국 요르크실르에서 Mary Pannell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Drakes nasceu aproximadamente 1247, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Captain Robert Drakes, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mrs, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Pannell aproximadamente 1276, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Drakes родился около 1247 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Captain Robert Drakes было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Pannell около 1276 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Drakes nació aproximadamente 1247, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Captain Robert Drakes, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mrs, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Mary Pannell aproximadamente 1276, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas.
